privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real-world 'Online Retail' dataset downloaded from a public GitHub repository. It expects the agent to parse the CSV, compute a cohort retention matrix, and output the retention rates CSV to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/retention_rates.csv' and a heatmap plot to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/retention_heatmap.png'. The ground truth is dynamically generated during environment setup using a hidden R script and saved to '/var/lib/rstudio/ground_truth/retention_ground_truth.csv'. The evaluation script uses Python to compare the mean retention rate across all cohorts at index 1 against the generated ground truth.
